models.item: Any equippable game object — weapon, ability, armor, ring, or talisman. Carries stats, mechanics, drop sources, and lore.
models.itemSet: An ST set: 4 items (weapon + ability + armor + ring) with a named set bonus that activates when the full set is equipped.
models.filterState: The user's current selection across the filter rail — which item types, classes, tiers, rarities, mechanics tags, and stat thresholds are active.
models.quickCompareEntry: An item the user has selected for the Quick Compare drawer.
models.dropSource: A dungeon, boss, or event from which an item drops, with rarity hint.

relationships: Item belongs to one or more PlayerClasses (via classes array)
ItemSet has exactly four Items and belongs to one or more PlayerClasses
FilterState filters the visible Items in the grid

items.name: Crystal Wand
items.lore: Carved from the prismatic shard of a fallen mage king.

items.name: T12 Wand of the Fallen
items.lore: Drips with the dust of lost worlds.

items.name: Doom Bow
items.lore: Pierces the souls of the slain.

items.name: Demon Blade
items.lore: Forged in the wail of a thousand fiends.

items.name: Spell of the Planewalker
items.lore: A scream of light through dimensions.

items.name: Spell of the Burning Sun
items.lore: The corona of a captured star.

items.name: Cloak of the Planewalker
items.lore: Stitched from the fabric between worlds.

items.name: Robe of the Grand Sorcerer
items.lore: A robe woven by the Grand Sorcerer himself.

items.name: Ring of Unbound Health
items.lore: Beats with a heart not quite your own.
